title: Hiring Store Manager at Nippon Paint Store

jsonLd.title: Hiring Store Manager at Nippon Paint Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Nippon Paint Store are looking for an experienced Store Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Nippon Paint Store:
Nippon Paint Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nippon Paint Store!
